## Outcome

Describe the behavior and invariant changed.

## Evidence

- [ ] Format, lint, typecheck, tests, build, audit, and package dry-run pass.
- [ ] Protected content and identity fallback remain covered.
- [ ] Proof/codec/wire changes are explicitly versioned.
- [ ] Token evidence includes decoder/framing, retry, recovery, and cache assumptions.
- [ ] Fixtures contain no private prompts, code, secrets, or CAS objects.
- [ ] Documentation and residual risks are updated.

## Rollback

Explain how to disable or revert this change safely.
